title: bulbostylis lateritica
intro: Bulbostylis lateritica, also known as the lateritic club-rush, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The medicinal properties of Bulbostylis lateritica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Bulbostylis lateritica include making tea by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, as well as using the plant in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
